    "electronics" => 0,
    "grocery" => 1,
    "pharmacy" => 2,
    "restaurant" => 3

  valid = []

    c = code[i]
    bl = businessLine[i]
    a = isActive[i]
    if c.empty? || !order.key?(bl) || !a
      next
    end
    if c.match?(/^[\w]+$/)
      valid << { code: c, businessLine: bl }
    end

  sorted = valid.sort do |a, b|
    a_order = order[a[:businessLine]]
    b_order = order[b[:businessLine]]
    if a_order != b_order
      a_order <=> b_order
    else
      a[:code] <=> b[:code]
    end
  end
  sorted.map { |x| x[:code] }
end
